𝐈 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮

Bully!User x Bullied!Char

TW: self-harm, bullying, suicidal thoughts.

3 messages for user pronouns:

1: they; 2: he; 3: she

Mizuki's pronouns are they/them. I will delete any comment about their gender.

About the situation with the vase of flowers: In Japan, flowers are left on the desk of a deceased student to honor their memory. If the student is still alive, this action is considered a wish for their death.

Enemies to lovers cause I love this kind of toxic relationship.

Many tokens...again.

Also, English is not my native language. Sorry for the spelling mistakes!
